final_answer: In this situation, the attraction offer is the front-end reason a cold STR or second-home owner engages with you: the $597 STR Design Diagnostic with listing/photo audit and priority summary. Its job is to create trust, surface the owner’s design/revenue problems, and turn interest into a buyer conversation. The upsell is what you offer after that engagement or sale to increase the customer value: the $5,000 pre-designed room packages sold per room or bundle. So the diagnostic answers, “Should I trust Lisa and what needs fixing?” The upsell answers, “Now that we know what needs fixing, do you want a faster/more packaged implementation path?” The core $15,000 full-service design offer sits between/around those as the main transformation. To judge whether this stack works financially, my next missing number is CAC.
